name: Cabbage and White Bean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 large rib celery, halved and sliced
15 ounces canned white kidney beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large saucepan coated lightly with cooking spray in a medium oven-safe skillet. Sauté onion for 3 minutes.
2. Add carrot and celery; sauté 3 minutes more.
3. Stir in caraway seed and cook, stirring, for an additional minute.
4. Add chopped cabbage, water, and brown sugar. Bring to a simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in canned tomatoes with their juice, breaking them up as they fall. Simmer, covered, for another 20 minutes.
6. Mix in the white kidney beans and cider vinegar. Continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes until heated through.
7. Stir in parsley if using. Serve hot, optionally alongside plain nonfat yogurt.
This recipe yields about 4 servings, each approximately 1 1/2 cups. Per serving: 157 Kcal, 0.9g fat (0.1g saturated), 5% of calories from fat (CFF), and 630mg sodium.
